Q08.opus_full_no_kg: WITH gold_vpn AS ( SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' ) SELECT gv.vpn_id, gv.vpn_name, gv.max_latency_ms AS sla_max_latency, t.tunnel_id, t.measured_latency_ms FROM gold_vpn gv JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', gv.vpn_id, '%') WHERE t.measured_latency_ms > gv.max_latency_ms ;
Q08.opus_full_with_kg: WITH latest_tunnel_kpi AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, tk.latency_avg_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.service_level, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_latency, t.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ltk.latency_avg_ms AS measured_latency FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' AND ltk.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms;
Q08.opus_link_no_kg: SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms, sk.collect_time FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE ;
Q08.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH latest_sla AS (
  SELECT sk.vpn_id, sk.kpi_id, sk.collect_time, sk.sla_latency_met
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct
    FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
    GROUP BY vpn_id
  ) lk ON sk.vpn_id = lk.vpn_id AND sk.collect_time = lk.max_ct
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN latest_sla ls ON ls.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE ;

Q09.opus_full_no_kg: WITH latest AS ( SELECT if_id, ne_id, in_bandwidth_usage_pct, out_bandwidth_usage_pct, collect_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY if_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ), latest_pe AS ( SELECT l.if_id, l.ne_id, GREATEST(COALESCE(l.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0), COALESCE(l.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) AS max_bw_pct FROM latest l JOIN t_network_element ne ON l.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_interface i ON l.if_id = i.if_id WHERE l.rn = 1 AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL' ) SELECT ne_id, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct < 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS idle_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 30 AND max_bw_pct < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 70 AND max_bw_pct < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS busy_count, SUM(CASE WHEN max_bw_pct >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overload_count FROM latest_pe GROUP BY ne_id ;
Q09.opus_full_with_kg: WITH latest_time AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi), bw AS (SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name, ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk JOIN t_interface i ON ipk.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON ipk.ne_id = ne.ne_id CROSS JOIN latest_time lt WHERE ipk.collect_time = lt.max_ct AND ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL') SELECT ne_id, ne_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30) AS idle_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct >= 30 AND out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 70) AS normal_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 70 AND out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 90) AS busy_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90) AS overload_count FROM bw GROUP BY ne_id, ne_name;
Q09.opus_link_no_kg: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi), pe_ifs AS (SELECT i.ne_id, i.if_id FROM t_interface i JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL') SELECT pf.ne_id, COUNT(*) AS total_physical_interfaces FROM pe_ifs pf JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi kpi ON pf.if_id = kpi.if_id CROSS JOIN latest l WHERE kpi.collect_time = l.max_ct GROUP BY pf.ne_id ;
Q09.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
),
latest_kpi AS (
  SELECT ik.ne_id, ik.if_id, ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik, latest l
  WHERE ik.collect_time = l.max_ct
)
SELECT ne.ne_id,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct < 30 THEN 1 END) AS idle_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct >= 30 AND lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 70 THEN 1 END) AS normal_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 70 AND lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct <= 90 THEN 1 END) AS busy_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN lk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct > 90 THEN 1 END) AS overload_count
FROM t_network_element ne
JOIN t_interface i ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id
JOIN latest_kpi lk ON lk.if_id = i.if_id
WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
GROUP BY ne.ne_id ;

Q10.opus_full_no_kg: WITH daily_cpu AS ( SELECT k.ne_id, CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) AS dt, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS daily_avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE s.region = '华北' AND ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id, CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) ), with_prev AS ( SELECT *, LAG(daily_avg_cpu) OVER (PARTITION BY ne_id ORDER BY dt) AS prev_day_cpu FROM daily_cpu ) SELECT ne_id, dt, daily_avg_cpu, prev_day_cpu, daily_avg_cpu - prev_day_cpu AS day_over_day_change FROM with_prev ORDER BY ne_id, dt ;
Q10.opus_full_with_kg: WITH daily_cpu AS (SELECT CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) AS day_date, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE s.region = '华北' AND ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE)) SELECT day_date, avg_cpu, avg_cpu - LAG(avg_cpu) OVER (ORDER BY day_date) AS day_over_day_change FROM daily_cpu ORDER BY day_date;
Q10.opus_link_no_kg: WITH daily_cpu AS (SELECT CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) AS dt, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND s.region = '华北' AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND k.cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE)) SELECT dt, avg_cpu, avg_cpu - LAG(avg_cpu) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS day_over_day_change FROM daily_cpu ORDER BY dt ;
Q10.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH daily_cpu AS (
  SELECT CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE) AS day_date,
         AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id
  JOIN t_site s ON s.site_id = ne.site_id
  WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
    AND s.region = '华北'
    AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
  GROUP BY CAST(k.collect_time AS DATE)
)
SELECT day_date, avg_cpu,
  avg_cpu - LAG(avg_cpu) OVER (ORDER BY day_date) AS day_over_day_change
FROM daily_cpu
ORDER BY day_date ;

Q100.opus_full_no_kg: WITH cust_fee AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0)) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ), fee_ranked AS ( SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM cust_fee ), cust_sla AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id ) SELECT fr.customer_id, fr.customer_name, fr.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM fee_ranked fr JOIN cust_sla cs ON fr.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE fr.pct_rank <= 0.20 AND cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples < 95 ORDER BY fr.total_fee DESC ;
Q100.opus_full_with_kg: WITH customer_fee AS (SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(v.monthly_fee) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name), fee_ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM customer_fee), top20_customers AS (SELECT customer_id, customer_name, total_fee FROM fee_ranked WHERE pct_rank <= 0.20), customer_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_samples FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id) SELECT tc.customer_id, tc.customer_name, tc.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_samples * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM top20_customers tc JOIN customer_sla cs ON tc.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE (cs.met_samples * 100.0 / cs.total_samples) < 95 ORDER BY tc.total_fee DESC;
Q100.opus_link_no_kg: WITH customer_fees AS (SELECT customer_id, customer_name, SUM(monthly_fee) AS total_fee FROM t_l3vpn_service WHERE service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND monthly_fee IS NOT NULL GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name), fee_ranked AS (SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank FROM customer_fees), customer_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD') AND sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id) SELECT fr.customer_id, fr.customer_name, fr.total_fee, ROUND(cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples, 2) AS sla_compliance_rate FROM fee_ranked fr JOIN customer_sla cs ON fr.customer_id = cs.customer_id WHERE fr.pct_rank <= 0.20 AND cs.met_count * 100.0 / cs.total_samples < 95 ;
Q100.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH customer_fee AS (
  SELECT customer_id, customer_name,
    SUM(monthly_fee) AS total_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service
  WHERE service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD')
    AND admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
),
fee_ranked AS (
  SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank
  FROM customer_fee
),
customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS compliance_rate
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD')
    AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
)
SELECT fr.customer_id, fr.customer_name, fr.total_fee, cs.compliance_rate
FROM fee_ranked fr
JOIN customer_sla cs ON cs.customer_id = fr.customer_id
WHERE fr.pct_rank <= 0.2
  AND cs.compliance_rate < 95 ;

Q11.opus_full_no_kg: WITH recent AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COUNT(*) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id ), vpn_agg AS ( SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(r.violation_count) AS total_violations, SUM(r.total_samples) AS total_samples, ROUND(SUM(r.violation_count) * 100.0 / SUM(r.total_samples), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN recent r ON v.vpn_id = r.vpn_id GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ) SELECT customer_id, customer_name, vpn_count, total_violations, violation_rate_pct FROM vpn_agg ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5 ;
Q11.opus_full_with_kg: WITH vpn_sla AS (SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, sk.vpn_id, sk.sla_overall_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE') SELECT customer_id, customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM vpn_sla GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;
Q11.opus_link_no_kg: SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sk.kpi_id), 2) AS violation_rate_pct FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ORDER BY violation_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5 ;
Q11.opus_link_with_kg:
SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT v.vpn_id) AS vpn_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 END) AS violation_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS violation_rate
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY
GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name
ORDER BY violation_rate DESC
LIMIT 5 ;

Q12.opus_full_no_kg: WITH site_pair_links AS ( SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site1, GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site2, COUNT(*) AS link_count, MIN(link_id) AS link_id FROM t_physical_link WHERE a_site_id IS NOT NULL AND z_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id), GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) SELECT sp.link_id, sp.site1, sp.site2, pl.link_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name FROM site_pair_links sp JOIN t_physical_link pl ON sp.link_id = pl.link_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON (t.associated_vpn_ids IS NOT NULL) AND ( (pl.a_ne_id = t.source_ne_id AND pl.z_ne_id = t.dest_ne_id) OR (pl.z_ne_id = t.source_ne_id AND pl.a_ne_id = t.dest_ne_id) ) JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') ;
Q12.opus_full_with_kg: WITH site_pair_links AS (SELECT LEAST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site_a, GREATEST(a_site_id, z_site_id) AS site_b, link_id, a_ne_id, z_ne_id FROM t_physical_link WHERE oper_status = 'UP'), single_links AS (SELECT site_a, site_b, MIN(link_id) AS link_id, MIN(a_ne_id) AS a_ne_id, MIN(z_ne_id) AS z_ne_id FROM site_pair_links GROUP BY site_a, site_b HAVING COUNT(*) = 1), gold_nes AS (SELECT DISTINCT b.ne_id FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM')) SELECT sl.link_id, sl.site_a, sl.site_b FROM single_links sl WHERE sl.a_ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM gold_nes) OR sl.z_ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM gold_nes);

Q12.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH site_pair_links AS (
  SELECT LEAST(pl.a_site_id, pl.z_site_id) AS site_a,
         GREATEST(pl.a_site_id, pl.z_site_id) AS site_b,
         COUNT(*) AS link_count,
         MIN(pl.link_id) AS link_id
  FROM t_physical_link pl
  WHERE pl.oper_status = 'UP'
  GROUP BY LEAST(pl.a_site_id, pl.z_site_id), GREATEST(pl.a_site_id, pl.z_site_id)
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
)
SELECT sp.link_id, sp.site_a, sp.site_b
FROM site_pair_links sp
JOIN t_physical_link pl ON pl.link_id = sp.link_id
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b
  JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('GOLD', 'PLATINUM')
    AND (b.ne_id = pl.a_ne_id OR b.ne_id = pl.z_ne_id)
) ;

Q14.opus_full_no_kg: WITH this_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), last_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14' DAY AND k.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), site_this AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS this_week_avg FROM this_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ), site_last AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS last_week_avg FROM last_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.last_week_avg, t.this_week_avg, t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg AS growth_pct FROM site_this t JOIN site_last l ON t.site_id = l.site_id WHERE t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg > 20 ORDER BY growth_pct DESC ;
Q14.opus_full_with_kg: WITH bw_by_site_week AS (SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, CASE WHEN ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS week_bucket, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk JOIN t_network_element ne ON ipk.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '14' DAY GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name, week_bucket) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.avg_bw AS last_week_avg, t.avg_bw AS this_week_avg, t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw AS growth FROM bw_by_site_week t JOIN bw_by_site_week l ON t.site_id = l.site_id AND t.week_bucket = 'THIS' AND l.week_bucket = 'LAST' WHERE t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw > 20;
Q14.opus_link_no_kg: WITH this_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id), last_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND kpi.collect_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id) SELECT tw.site_id FROM this_week tw JOIN last_week lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id ;
Q14.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
    CASE WHEN ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS week_bucket,
    AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_usage
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON ne.ne_id = ik.ne_id
  WHERE ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY ne.site_id, CASE WHEN ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_id, lw.avg_usage AS last_week_avg, tw.avg_usage AS this_week_avg,
  tw.avg_usage - lw.avg_usage AS growth
FROM weekly tw
JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id AND tw.week_bucket = 'THIS' AND lw.week_bucket = 'LAST'
WHERE tw.avg_usage - lw.avg_usage > 20 ;

Q15.opus_full_no_kg: WITH latest_sla AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) AS lat_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) AS jit_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_loss_met, FALSE) AS loss_met, COALESCE(sk.sla_availability_met, FALSE) AS avail_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ), scores AS ( SELECT ls.vpn_id, (CASE WHEN ls.lat_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.jit_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.loss_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN ls.avail_met THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score FROM latest_sla ls WHERE ls.rn = 1 ) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.service_level, sc.health_score FROM scores sc JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sc.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND sc.health_score < 75 ;
Q15.opus_full_with_kg: WITH vpn_scores AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG( (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) ) AS health_score FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id) SELECT vs.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, vs.health_score FROM vpn_scores vs JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vs.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE vs.health_score < 75;
Q15.opus_link_no_kg: WITH latest_sla AS (SELECT sk.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN latest_sla ls ON v.vpn_id = ls.vpn_id AND ls.rn = 1 WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ls.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 75 ;
Q15.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH vpn_scores AS (
  SELECT sk.vpn_id,
    AVG(
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_jitter_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_loss_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_availability_met, FALSE) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    ) AS health_score
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk
  WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
  GROUP BY sk.vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, vs.health_score
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN vpn_scores vs ON vs.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND vs.health_score < 75 ;

Q40.opus_full_no_kg: WITH latest_kpi AS ( SELECT if_id, oper_status AS kpi_oper_status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY if_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ) SELECT i.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, i.oper_status AS current_oper_status, lk.kpi_oper_status FROM t_interface i JOIN latest_kpi lk ON i.if_id = lk.if_id AND lk.rn = 1 WHERE i.oper_status = 'UP' AND lk.kpi_oper_status = 'DOWN' ;

Q63.opus_full_no_kg: WITH pe_stats AS ( SELECT k.ne_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu, AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem, AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp, AVG(COALESCE(k.alarm_critical_count, 0) + COALESCE(k.alarm_major_count, 0) + COALESCE(k.alarm_minor_count, 0)) AS avg_alarms FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id ), scores AS ( SELECT s.ne_id, 25 * (1 - LEAST(s.avg_cpu, 100) / 100.0) AS cpu_score, 25 * (1 - LEAST(s.avg_mem, 100) / 100.0) AS mem_score, 25 * CASE WHEN s.avg_temp <= 45 THEN 1.0 WHEN s.avg_temp <= 70 THEN (70 - s.avg_temp) / 25.0 ELSE 0 END AS temp_score, 25 * CASE WHEN s.avg_alarms = 0 THEN 1.0 WHEN s.avg_alarms <= 5 THEN (5 - s.avg_alarms) / 5.0 ELSE 0 END AS alarm_score FROM pe_stats s ) SELECT sc.ne_id, ne.ne_name, ROUND(sc.cpu_score + sc.mem_score + sc.temp_score + sc.alarm_score, 2) AS health_score FROM scores sc JOIN t_network_element ne ON sc.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND (sc.cpu_score + sc.mem_score + sc.temp_score + sc.alarm_score) < 60 ORDER BY health_score ASC ;
Q63.opus_full_with_kg: WITH device_health AS (SELECT k.ne_id, AVG(CASE WHEN k.cpu_usage_avg_pct < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN k.memory_usage_avg_pct < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN k.temperature_avg_c < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN (k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count) < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id) SELECT dh.ne_id, ne.ne_name, dh.health_score FROM device_health dh JOIN t_network_element ne ON dh.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE dh.health_score < 60 ORDER BY dh.health_score;
Q63.opus_link_no_kg: WITH pe_stats AS (SELECT ne.ne_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND k.cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne.ne_id) SELECT ne_id, avg_cpu, CASE WHEN avg_cpu <= 50 THEN 25 WHEN avg_cpu <= 80 THEN 25 * (1 - (avg_cpu - 50) / 50.0) ELSE 0 END AS cpu_score FROM pe_stats WHERE CASE WHEN avg_cpu <= 50 THEN 25 WHEN avg_cpu <= 80 THEN 25 * (1 - (avg_cpu - 50) / 50.0) ELSE 0 END < 15 ;
Q63.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH pe_health AS (
  SELECT ne.ne_id,
    AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
    AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_memory,
    AVG(k.temperature_avg_c) AS avg_temp,
    AVG(k.alarm_critical_count + k.alarm_major_count) AS avg_alarm
  FROM t_network_element ne
  JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id
  WHERE ne.role = 'PE'
    AND k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
  GROUP BY ne.ne_id
)
SELECT ne_id,
  (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN avg_memory < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
   CASE WHEN avg_alarm < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) AS health_score
FROM pe_health
WHERE (CASE WHEN avg_cpu < 70 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_memory < 75 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_temp < 60 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END +
       CASE WHEN avg_alarm < 5 THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 60 ;

Q64.opus_full_no_kg: WITH this_period AS ( SELECT k.if_id, AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY k.if_id ), prev_period AS ( SELECT k.if_id, AVG(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND k.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY k.if_id ) SELECT tp.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, pp.avg_out_bw AS prev_avg, tp.avg_out_bw AS curr_avg, tp.avg_out_bw - pp.avg_out_bw AS growth FROM this_period tp JOIN prev_period pp ON tp.if_id = pp.if_id JOIN t_interface i ON tp.if_id = i.if_id WHERE pp.avg_out_bw > 0 ORDER BY growth DESC LIMIT 10 ;
Q64.opus_full_with_kg: WITH recent AS (SELECT ipk.if_id, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY ipk.if_id), previous AS (SELECT ipk.if_id, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND ipk.collect_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY ipk.if_id) SELECT r.if_id, i.if_name, i.ne_id, r.avg_bw AS recent_avg, p.avg_bw AS prev_avg, r.avg_bw - p.avg_bw AS growth FROM recent r JOIN previous p ON r.if_id = p.if_id JOIN t_interface i ON r.if_id = i.if_id ORDER BY growth DESC LIMIT 10;
Q64.opus_link_no_kg: WITH recent AS (SELECT if_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY if_id), prev AS (SELECT if_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY if_id) SELECT r.if_id FROM recent r JOIN prev p ON r.if_id = p.if_id ORDER BY r.sample_count - p.sample_count DESC LIMIT 10 ;
Q64.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH recent AS (
  SELECT if_id, AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_recent
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
  GROUP BY if_id
),
previous AS (
  SELECT if_id, AVG(out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_prev
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi
  WHERE collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '48' HOUR
    AND collect_time < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR
  GROUP BY if_id
)
SELECT r.if_id, r.avg_recent, p.avg_prev,
  r.avg_recent - p.avg_prev AS growth
FROM recent r
JOIN previous p ON p.if_id = r.if_id
ORDER BY growth DESC
LIMIT 10 ;

Q65.opus_full_no_kg: WITH latest_vpn_sla AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) AS overall_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ), failed_vpns AS ( SELECT vpn_id FROM latest_vpn_sla WHERE rn = 1 AND overall_met = FALSE ), latest_tunnel_kpi AS ( SELECT tk.tunnel_id, COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) AS sla_violation, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ) SELECT DISTINCT fv.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, t.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name FROM failed_vpns fv JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON fv.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', fv.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE ltk.sla_violation = FALSE ;
Q65.opus_full_with_kg: WITH latest_vpn_sla AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, sk.sla_overall_met, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sk.vpn_id ORDER BY sk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk), latest_tunnel_kpi AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, tk.sla_violation, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk) SELECT DISTINCT lvs.vpn_id, v.vpn_name FROM latest_vpn_sla lvs JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON lvs.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', lvs.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE lvs.rn = 1 AND COALESCE(lvs.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE AND COALESCE(ltk.sla_violation, FALSE) = FALSE;
Q65.opus_link_no_kg: WITH latest_vpn_sla AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY vpn_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi), latest_tunnel_kpi AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tunnel_id ORDER BY collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi) SELECT DISTINCT lv.vpn_id FROM latest_vpn_sla lv JOIN t_tunnel tun ON tun.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', lv.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON tun.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE lv.rn = 1 AND COALESCE(lv.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE AND COALESCE(ltk.sla_violation, FALSE) = FALSE ;
Q65.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH latest_vpn_sla AS (
  SELECT sk.*
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi GROUP BY vpn_id
  ) lk ON sk.vpn_id = lk.vpn_id AND sk.collect_time = lk.max_ct
),
latest_tunnel_kpi AS (
  SELECT tk.*
  FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT tunnel_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi GROUP BY tunnel_id
  ) lt ON tk.tunnel_id = lt.tunnel_id AND tk.collect_time = lt.max_ct
)
SELECT ls.vpn_id
FROM latest_vpn_sla ls
WHERE COALESCE(ls.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM t_tunnel t
    JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON ltk.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
    WHERE t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', ls.vpn_id, '%')
      AND COALESCE(ltk.sla_violation, FALSE) = FALSE
  ) ;

Q66.opus_full_no_kg: WITH tunnel_stats AS ( SELECT tk.tunnel_id, SUM(COALESCE(tk.path_change_count, 0)) AS total_path_changes, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk WHERE tk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id ) SELECT ts.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ts.total_path_changes, ts.violation_count FROM tunnel_stats ts JOIN t_tunnel t ON ts.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id WHERE ts.total_path_changes > 0 AND ts.violation_count > 0 ORDER BY ts.total_path_changes DESC LIMIT 5 ;
Q66.opus_full_with_kg: WITH tunnel_stats AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, SUM(tk.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS violation_count FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk WHERE tk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id) SELECT ts.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ts.total_path_changes, ts.violation_count FROM tunnel_stats ts JOIN t_tunnel t ON ts.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id WHERE ts.violation_count > 0 ORDER BY ts.total_path_changes DESC LIMIT 5;
Q66.opus_link_no_kg: WITH status_changes AS (SELECT tunnel_id, collect_time, oper_status, sla_violation, LAG(oper_status) OVER (PARTITION BY tunnel_id ORDER BY collect_time) AS prev_status FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY), tunnel_stats AS (SELECT tunnel_id, SUM(CASE WHEN oper_status != prev_status AND prev_status IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS path_switches, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sla_violations FROM status_changes GROUP BY tunnel_id) SELECT tunnel_id, path_switches, sla_violations FROM tunnel_stats WHERE path_switches > 0 AND sla_violations > 0 ORDER BY path_switches DESC LIMIT 5 ;
Q66.opus_link_with_kg:
SELECT tk.tunnel_id,
  SUM(tk.path_change_count) AS total_path_changes,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 END) AS violation_count
FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk
WHERE tk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
GROUP BY tk.tunnel_id
HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(tk.sla_violation, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 END) > 0
ORDER BY total_path_changes DESC
LIMIT 5 ;

Q67.opus_full_no_kg: WITH plat_sla AS ( SELECT v.vpn_id, s.region, COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) AS overall_met FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM' ) SELECT region, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN overall_met THEN 100.0 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS avg_sla_met_pct FROM plat_sla GROUP BY region ORDER BY avg_sla_met_pct ASC ;
Q67.opus_full_with_kg: WITH region_vpn AS (SELECT DISTINCT s.region, b.vpn_id FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM') SELECT rv.region, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS sla_met_rate_pct FROM region_vpn rv JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON rv.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id GROUP BY rv.region ORDER BY sla_met_rate_pct;
Q67.opus_link_no_kg: SELECT s.region, COUNT(sk.kpi_id) AS total_samples, SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS met_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(sk.kpi_id), 2) AS compliance_rate FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON b.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE v.service_level = 'PLATINUM' GROUP BY s.region ;
Q67.opus_link_with_kg:
SELECT s.region,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS compliance_rate

Q68.opus_full_no_kg: WITH ce_as_customers AS ( SELECT b.ce_as_number, v.customer_id, v.customer_name FROM t_vpn_pe_binding b JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON b.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE b.ce_as_number IS NOT NULL AND b.routing_protocol = 'EBGP' ) SELECT ce_as_number, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS customer_count FROM ce_as_customers GROUP BY ce_as_number HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) > 1 ;

Q69.opus_full_no_kg: WITH vpn_loss AS ( SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id ) SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, ROUND(vl.avg_loss * COALESCE(v.monthly_fee, 0), 2) AS loss_risk_score FROM vpn_loss vl JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vl.vpn_id = v.vpn_id ORDER BY v.customer_id, loss_risk_score DESC ;
Q69.opus_full_with_kg: WITH vpn_loss AS (SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk WHERE sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY sk.vpn_id) SELECT v.customer_id, v.customer_name, SUM(vl.avg_loss * v.monthly_fee) AS monthly_loss_risk FROM vpn_loss vl JOIN t_l3vpn_service v ON vl.vpn_id = v.vpn_id WHERE v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY v.customer_id, v.customer_name ORDER BY monthly_loss_risk DESC;

Q69.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH vpn_loss AS (
  SELECT sk.vpn_id, AVG(sk.e2e_packet_loss_pct) AS avg_loss

Q70.opus_full_no_kg: WITH srv6_pe AS ( SELECT ne.ne_id FROM t_network_element ne WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND COALESCE(ne.srv6_enabled, FALSE) = TRUE ), low_lat_pe AS ( SELECT DISTINCT sp.source_ne_id AS ne_id FROM t_srv6_policy sp WHERE sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY' ), high_cpu_pe AS ( SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70 ) SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name FROM srv6_pe s JOIN low_lat_pe ll ON s.ne_id = ll.ne_id JOIN high_cpu_pe hc ON s.ne_id = hc.ne_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.ne_id = ne.ne_id ;
Q70.opus_full_with_kg: WITH low_latency_pe AS (SELECT DISTINCT sp.source_ne_id AS ne_id FROM t_srv6_policy sp WHERE sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY'), high_cpu_pe AS (SELECT k.ne_id FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY k.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70) SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name FROM t_network_element ne WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND COALESCE(ne.srv6_enabled, FALSE) = TRUE AND ne.ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM low_latency_pe) AND ne.ne_id IN (SELECT ne_id FROM high_cpu_pe);
Q70.opus_link_no_kg: WITH high_cpu_pe AS (SELECT ne_id, AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne_id HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 70) SELECT DISTINCT ne.ne_id FROM t_network_element ne JOIN high_cpu_pe hc ON ne.ne_id = hc.ne_id JOIN t_srv6_policy sp ON sp.source_ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ne.role = 'PE' AND COALESCE(ne.srv6_enabled, FALSE) = TRUE AND sp.sla_type = 'LOW_LATENCY' ;
Q70.opus_link_with_kg:
SELECT ne.ne_id

Q72.opus_full_no_kg: WITH device_count AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS ne_count FROM t_network_element ne GROUP BY ne.site_id ), link_endpoints AS ( SELECT a_site_id AS site_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_physical_link WHERE a_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY a_site_id UNION ALL SELECT z_site_id AS site_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_physical_link WHERE z_site_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY z_site_id ), link_agg AS ( SELECT site_id, SUM(cnt) AS link_endpoint_count FROM link_endpoints GROUP BY site_id ) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, COALESCE(dc.ne_count, 0) AS device_count, COALESCE(la.link_endpoint_count, 0) AS link_endpoint_count FROM t_site s LEFT JOIN device_count dc ON s.site_id = dc.site_id LEFT JOIN link_agg la ON s.site_id = la.site_id ;

Q99.opus_full_no_kg: WITH site_cpu_mem AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu, AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY ne.site_id ), site_bw AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik JOIN t_network_element ne ON ik.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE ik.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY ne.site_id ) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, ROUND(0.4 * COALESCE(scm.avg_cpu, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(scm.avg_mem, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(sb.avg_out_bw, 0), 2) AS pressure_index FROM t_site s LEFT JOIN site_cpu_mem scm ON s.site_id = scm.site_id LEFT JOIN site_bw sb ON s.site_id = sb.site_id ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10 ;

Q99.opus_link_with_kg:
WITH site_cpu_mem AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
    AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
    AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_memory
  FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id
  WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
),
site_if AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
    AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON ne.ne_id = ik.ne_id
  WHERE ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT cm.site_id,
  ROUND(0.4 * cm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * cm.avg_memory + 0.3 * si.avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index
FROM site_cpu_mem cm
JOIN site_if si ON si.site_id = cm.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC
LIMIT 10 ;
